name: bottemplate
description: A Discord.js v14 slash-command bot template with categorized commands and runtime stats.
author: aozdev

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check src/handlers/commandHandler.js && node --check src/handlers/eventHandler.js && node --check src/events/interactionCreate.js && node --check src/events/ready.js && node --check src/commands/general/help.js && node --check src/commands/general/ping.js && node --check src/commands/general/avatar.js && node --check src/commands/general/stats.js && node --check src/commands/developer/eval.js && node --check src/utils/collectFiles.js
